title: New Zealand income supplement data package | Stats NZ
content:
## New Zealand income supplement data package
13 January 2021, 10:45am

## New Zealand income supplement (NZIS) data packages for CONZUL not on website
NZIS data packages were made for CONZUL with areas, ethnicity, age, sex, and highest qualification. The NZIS provides information on wages and salaries, self-employment, government transfers, and other transfer income.
These are no longer the most accurate data. When updated population figures are applied (for example after a census), the weights for NZIS change and the CONZUL tables become outdated. These outdated tables can be requested.
Please contact our customised data service to discuss the best available data (email info@stats.govt.nz ).
NZIS tables are available on NZ.Stat (but for more detail a customised table can be made).
- Statistics for university staff and students 13 January 2021
